headline: how to claim fica tip credit Preparation Checklist — Chicago
articleBody:
how to claim fica tip credit Preparation Checklist for Chicago Clients

Before your how to claim fica tip credit appointment with Reclaim Tax Credits, make sure you have the following ready:

1. Payroll records
2. Tip reports
3. Tax returns
4. Employee w-2s
5. Credit card statements

Contact Reclaim Tax Credits at 1-213-537-5613 to get started.
